headline: Las Vegas Sands Corp. (LVS): Billionaire Paul Tudor Jones More Than Doubles Stake
summary: Las Vegas Sands Corp. (NYSE:LVS) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Paul Tudor Jones. Las Vegas Sands Corp. (NYSE:LVS) owns, develops, and operates integrated resorts that feature accommodations, gaming, entertainment and retail malls, convention and exhibition facilities, celebrity chef restaurants, and other amenities.
